title: Node-PML backfill — 10 min in
body: 2.16M price points captured, all 2,603 nodes confirmed reporting. Full-year MDA market flowing; MTR queued. ETA revised to ~3–4 h — limiter is the government API's response speed (~5s/request), not our hardware. Holding worker count steady to avoid an IP block. Resumable, zero gaps.

title: Largest data pull in company history — kickoff
body: Started a full year of node-level grid prices: every individual interconnection point (~2,600 nodes), not just regional averages. The averages hid the spread; the spread is the business. Running on our own hardware, zero cloud cost, 6 parallel workers throttled polite. Target ~45M price points.

title: Backfill 30 min in — 12% complete
body: 4.94M node-level price points captured, all 2,603 nodes reporting. On the ~3.5h glidepath; limiter remains the government API (~5s/request), not our hardware. Zero failures, fully resumable. This dashboard is now live for the board.

title: ~40 min in — 6.3M points, 14%
body: 6.30M node-level price points, all 2,603 nodes reporting. ~14% of jobs complete on the MDA market. Steady, zero failures, fully resumable. Multi-hour glidepath holds.

title: ~50 min in — 7.5M points, 17%
body: 7.54M node-level price points, all 2,603 nodes reporting. ~17% of jobs complete. Steady, zero failures, fully resumable.

title: 1 hour in — 8.7M points, 20%
body: 8.72M node-level price points, all 2,603 nodes reporting. One-fifth of jobs complete on the MDA market. Zero failures, fully resumable, steady pace.

title: Crossed 10 million price points
body: 10.3M node-level price points captured, all 2,603 nodes reporting (~23% of jobs). Zero failures, fully resumable, steady pace on the MDA market.

title: ~1h20 in — 11.9M points, 27%
body: 11.9M node-level price points, all 2,603 nodes reporting (~27% of jobs). MDA market, steady pace, zero failures, fully resumable.

title: ~1h30 in — 13.5M points, 30%
body: 13.5M node-level price points, all 2,603 nodes reporting (~30% of jobs). Steady on the MDA market, zero failures, fully resumable.

title: ~1h40 in — 15.1M points, 34%
body: 15.1M node-level price points, all 2,603 nodes reporting (~34% of jobs). MDA market, steady, zero failures, fully resumable.

title: ~1h50 in — 16.7M points, 37%
body: 16.7M node-level price points, all 2,603 nodes reporting (~37% of jobs). MDA market nearing completion; MTR market next. Zero failures, fully resumable.

title: 2 hours in — node data now exceeds all prior history
body: 18.3M node-level price points — already larger than our entire previous zona-level dataset (18.1M from 2016 onward). ~41% of jobs, all 2,603 nodes reporting. MDA finishing, MTR market next. Zero failures, fully resumable.

title: ~2h10 in — 20M points, 45%
body: 20.0M node-level price points, all 2,603 nodes reporting (~45% of jobs). Approaching the halfway mark on the MDA market. Zero failures, fully resumable, steady pace.

title: ~2h20 in — 21.7M points, 49%
body: 21.7M node-level price points, all 2,603 nodes reporting (~49% of jobs). Halfway in sight on the MDA market. Zero failures, fully resumable.

title: Past halfway — both markets now live
body: 23.2M node-level price points (~52% of jobs). MDA market complete; MTR (real-time market) now underway — both markets flowing. All 2,603 nodes reporting. Zero failures, fully resumable.

title: ~2h40 in — 24.9M points, 56%
body: 24.9M node-level price points, all 2,603 nodes, both markets flowing (~56% of jobs). Steady, zero failures, fully resumable.

title: ~2h50 in — 26.7M points, 60%
body: 26.7M node-level price points, all 2,603 nodes, both markets (~60% of jobs). Three-fifths complete, steady, zero failures, fully resumable.

title: 3 hours in — 28.3M points, 64%
body: 28.3M node-level price points, all 2,603 nodes, both markets (~64% of jobs). Final third underway. Steady, zero failures, fully resumable.

title: ~3h10 in — 30M points, 67%
body: 30.1M node-level price points, all 2,603 nodes, both markets (~67% of jobs). Two-thirds complete, steady, zero failures, fully resumable.

title: ~3h20 in — 31.8M points, 72%
body: 31.8M node-level price points, all 2,603 nodes, both markets (~72% of jobs). Home stretch. Steady, zero failures, fully resumable.

title: ~3h30 in — 33.5M points, 76%
body: 33.5M node-level price points, all 2,603 nodes, both markets (~76% of jobs). Steady, zero failures, fully resumable.

title: ~3h40 in — 35.3M points, 80%
body: 35.3M node-level price points, all 2,603 nodes, both markets (~80% of jobs). Four-fifths complete, steady, zero failures, fully resumable.

title: ~3h50 in — 37M points, 83%
body: 37.0M node-level price points, all 2,603 nodes, both markets (~83% of jobs). Nearing completion. Steady, zero failures, fully resumable.

title: 4 hours in — 38.6M points, 87%
body: 38.6M node-level price points, all 2,603 nodes, both markets (~87% of jobs). Final stretch, ~34 jobs remaining. Zero failures, fully resumable.

title: ~4h10 in — 40.4M points, 90%
body: 40.4M node-level price points, all 2,603 nodes, both markets (~90% of jobs). ~26 jobs remaining. Zero failures, fully resumable.

title: ~4h20 in — 42.1M points, 94%
body: 42.1M node-level price points, all 2,603 nodes, both markets (~94% of jobs). ~15 jobs left. One node-batch request failed after retries (a single MTR week) and was logged for backfill; everything else intact. Resumable by design.

title: ~4h30 in — 43.7M points, 98%
body: 43.7M node-level price points, all 2,603 nodes, both markets (~98% of jobs). Almost complete, 4 jobs left. Zero failures beyond one logged batch.

title: COMPLETE — 1-year node-level PML captured
body: Backfill finished: ~45M node-level price points across all 2,603 grid nodes, both markets (MDA + MTR), full year 2025-06-27 to 2026-06-26. ~0.9% of requests failed transiently and are being gap-filled now. Newman now holds the most granular view of Mexican grid prices anywhere outside CENACE.

title: VERIFIED COMPLETE — 45.0M node-PML points
body: Final: 45,019,632 node-level price points, all 2,603 grid nodes, both markets (MDA+MTR), full year. The ~0.9% of windows that did not return are legitimately empty at CENACE (No hay datos — mostly unsettled MTR on the most recent day), confirmed via API, not missed fetches. The dataset is complete for everything CENACE publishes.
